name: Dumbbell Calf Raise
resistance_profile: Tension peaks in the deep stretch with the heels dropped below the step; the load eases off toward the top squeeze as you rise onto the toes and the ankle's moment arm shortens.
cues: Hold a dumbbell, ball of the foot on a step
Full stretch at the bottom, tall squeeze at the top
Pause a beat at each end
execution_steps: Hold a dumbbell in one hand, balls of the feet on a step with heels off the edge
Steady yourself with the free hand on a rail or wall
Lower your heels below the step for a full stretch
Press up onto your toes as high as you can and squeeze
Pause a beat at the top and bottom of each rep
good_when: You need more load than bodyweight but have no calf machine
Training calves at home with dumbbells
Doing single-leg work to add resistance progressively
bad_when: You need heavy loading (grip and balance limit the dumbbell weight)
You want to bias the soleus specifically (seated calf raise is better)
